3131700.name: Captain Corgi: Planetary Problem Solver
3131700.description:
Mr Wolf is up to no good and Lil Red might be in trouble! But things aren't always what they seem with the residents of Townsvilleland. Now it's up to Captain Corgi to investigate this island planet and figure out what's really going on!

This is a short, lighthearted, narrative adventure game with some puzzle solving and a few minigames mixed in.

Gather info from the townsfolk, swap items and sail through space with Corgi and his brother Lem on their quest to become professional problem solvers! Or at least that's Corgi's quest. Lem is kind of just along for the ride because their mom told him to "Look after your little brother".

Features:

  • About a two hour long adventure

  • Chill exploration at your own pace

  • Quirky animal characters to chat with

  • A 'bark' button

  • Items to collect and secrets to uncover

  • Space sailing!
3131700.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 日语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
